name: get_assessment_score
short_description: Get QOR Assessment Score for the given design
full_help:
get_assessment_score

Description: 
Get QOR Assessment Score for the given design

Syntax: 
get_assessment_score  [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Feasibility, Timing

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
